description: Prompt-set based visual QA classifiers for single-image compliance checks.

positive_prompts: a farmer standing near a solar panel installation in a field
a person beside ground-mounted solar panels on farmland
farmer interacting with a solar panel structure outdoors
human subject and solar panel array clearly visible together
agricultural scene with farmer next to photovoltaic panels
worker near solar modules in an open land setting
farmer inspecting solar panel equipment in a field
solar power setup with a clearly visible farmer nearby
negative_prompts: solar panels only with no person visible
a person in a field without any solar panel
rooftop solar installation with no farmer
close-up of panel cells without a human subject
farmer portrait without visible solar infrastructure
machinery scene with no photovoltaic panel present
group of people not near solar installations
landscape view where solar panels are not identifiable

positive_prompts: a farmer near a control panel mounted on a cemented foundation
human subject with controller box and concrete base clearly visible
farmer standing next to control unit installed on cement platform
control panel on a cement plinth with a farmer nearby
agricultural installation showing farmer, controller, and concrete foundation
person interacting with control panel fixed to a cement base
farmer beside electrical box on a concrete pedestal
clear view of farmer and control panel over cemented structure
negative_prompts: control panel visible but no concrete foundation
concrete platform visible without control panel
farmer and concrete base with no controller device
control panel mounted on wall instead of cement base
farmer near machinery unrelated to control panel foundation
close-up of concrete surface without panel or person
electrical box scene without any human subject
farmer scene without visible cemented installation base

positive_prompts: farmer standing beside a control panel unit
human subject interacting with an electrical controller box
person near a controller cabinet in an outdoor setup
farmer and control panel clearly visible in the same frame
worker operating or pointing at a controller panel
agricultural site showing farmer with control device
farmer next to monitoring or controller box
clear scene of person and controller together
negative_prompts: control panel only with no person visible
person visible without any controller box
farmer near pump or pipe but no controller present
electrical equipment too far to identify as controller
indoor office control desk unrelated to field installation
portrait of farmer without visible device
machine room scene with no identifiable human subject
close-up of labels or wires without full controller context

positive_prompts: front-facing view of a solar panel module
solar panel surface seen directly from the front
clear photovoltaic cell grid visible on panel front side
full panel face occupying most of the frame
solar module with minimal angle distortion and clear front view
straight-on image of PV panel cell pattern
panel front sheet clearly visible with rectangular grid lines
primary subject is the front side of a solar module
negative_prompts: rear side of a solar panel with junction box visible
edge view of panel without front cell grid
oblique angle where panel front is not clearly visible
distant solar farm where module face is not detailed
image focused on frame or mounting hardware only
non-solar glass surface mistaken as a panel
panel blocked by shadows or heavy occlusion
close-up of unrelated electrical components

positive_prompts: farmer standing near a pipe with visible flowing water
person beside active water discharge from pump outlet
farmer interacting with irrigation flow from a pipe
clear water stream exiting outlet with farmer in frame
human subject near running water discharge in field
operator present at visible pump water discharge
agricultural water release scene with farmer nearby
person and clearly visible flowing discharge from source
negative_prompts: farmer near dry pipe with no water flow
flowing water visible but no person present
person near pump equipment without discharge
standing water or puddle with no visible outlet flow
rainfall scene not showing pipe or pump discharge
water tank scene without active outflow
farmer portrait with no irrigation activity
pipe visible but stream not visible

positive_prompts: inside of a device showing an IMEI label
battery compartment with readable IMEI number
inner panel sticker containing IMEI text
device interior with clearly legible IMEI code
close-up of phone or modem interior showing IMEI
printed IMEI on internal label inside hardware casing
open device compartment with IMEI identifier visible
clear view of IMEI digits on inside sticker
negative_prompts: device exterior only with no inside compartment
barcode or serial label that does not show IMEI
blurred text label where numbers are unreadable
invoice or paper document showing IMEI text
phone screen displaying settings instead of internal label
general electronics label without IMEI keyword context
inside device image with label cropped out
close-up of battery without any readable code

positive_prompts: an Aadhaar card clearly visible in the frame
Indian Aadhaar ID card showing typical layout and fields
government identity card with Aadhaar-style design
Aadhaar document with photo and text sections visible
clear image of Aadhaar card held by a person
Aadhaar card placed on a surface with readable structure
UIDAI-style Aadhaar card front side view
identity card recognizable as an Aadhaar card
negative_prompts: PAN card or other ID card that is not Aadhaar
voter ID or driving license instead of Aadhaar
document image with no identifiable ID card
blurred card where card type is unclear
paper form or certificate not an identity card
mobile screenshot of personal details not card photo
business card or bank card mistaken as Aadhaar
partial card crop that hides key Aadhaar features

positive_prompts: water pump with readable serial number on nameplate
pump body showing serial number label clearly
machine pump with identifiable serial code on sticker
close-up of pump plate with legible serial text
pump equipment context with visible serial number
serial number tag attached to irrigation pump
metal plate on pump containing readable serial digits
pump unit and serial label both visible
negative_prompts: pump visible but no serial label present
serial number text visible without pump context
blurred pump label with unreadable code
motor nameplate shown instead of pump label
controller serial label mistaken as pump serial
pipe or valve image with no pump body
handwritten number not on official machine label
distant pump image where label cannot be read

positive_prompts: electric motor with readable serial number on nameplate
motor body showing serial number label clearly
close-up of motor plate with legible serial text
industrial motor with visible identification serial code
electric motor and attached serial sticker in frame
motor housing with engraved or printed serial number
clear motor context with readable serial digits
nameplate on motor containing serial number
negative_prompts: motor visible but serial number not readable
serial number label shown without motor context
pump serial plate mistaken for motor plate
controller serial plate instead of motor label
blurred metal plate with illegible text
generic machinery image without motor identification
wires and parts only no full motor body
barcode label unrelated to electric motor

positive_prompts: controller box with readable serial number label
control panel showing serial code on sticker or plate
electrical controller cabinet with legible serial number
controller unit and serial label clearly visible together
close-up of controller nameplate with serial text
control box surface showing identification serial digits
field controller device with visible serial tag
clear serial number on control panel body
negative_prompts: controller visible but no serial label shown
serial label visible without controller context
motor nameplate mistaken as controller serial
pump label instead of controller serial plate
wiring cabinet image with unreadable label
electrical panel far away with no legible code
paper document with serial text not on controller
controller screen only no physical serial plate

positive_prompts: water discharge flowing onto a cemented platform
visible water stream filling over concrete base
pipe outlet releasing water on a concrete mat
active water flow on cement floor near installation
clear water movement over cemented surface
discharge point with water spreading on concrete slab
water outlet and cement platform both prominently visible
irrigation flow onto a concrete or cement pad
negative_prompts: water flow on soil with no cement platform
cement platform visible but no active water flow
standing wet surface without visible discharge source
water tank filling scene not on concrete mat
pipe and platform visible but no flowing stream
person pouring water manually not discharge outlet
rainwater on concrete without outlet context
dry concrete base with no water present

positive_prompts: electrical earthing wire and lightning protection component visible
grounding strip connected to equipment with lightning arrester
earthing system and lightning conductor in the same setup
ground rod wiring and surge or lightning protection hardware
clear view of grounding connection and lightning safety component
electrical installation showing earthing plus lightning arrestor
bonding wire and lightning protection unit visibly installed
earthing arrangement with identifiable lightning protection device
negative_prompts: general electrical wiring without earthing components
earthing wire visible but no lightning protection element
lightning arrester shown without grounding connection
control panel internals with no grounding setup visible
pole or cable image lacking identifiable protection hardware
construction metal rods mistaken for grounding system
electrical scene too distant to verify components
diagram or schematic instead of real installation photo

positive_prompts: full exterior view of the installation boundary and layout
outside contour of the complete system visible in one frame
wide shot showing entire external structure of setup
overall installation shape and perimeter clearly captured
complete outer view of equipment arrangement on site
external perspective showing full footprint of installation
broad view including full system outline and surroundings
site image focused on total exterior contour
negative_prompts: close-up of a single component without full installation view
partial structure crop where system boundary is missing
interior or inside view instead of outside contour
zoomed detail shot of panel or controller only
image blocked by objects obscuring full installation
portrait-oriented close shot lacking full site layout
night image where boundary and shape are unclear
distant landscape with installation not clearly identifiable
